title: Glow-in-the-Dark Pokemon [Cobblemon]
description: Makes various Pokemon emit light with various intensities
body:
![Glow-in-the-Dark Pokemon Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10124e0dd82408324525079f2543434b93325b68.jpeg)

This datapack adds properties to over 100 pokemon that allows them to give off light. The intensity of the light is set per species. Whether or not the light persists underwater is also set per species (for example, a Chamander will emit light on land but not in water).

In order for this to work, you will need a mod that adds dynamic lighting to Minecraft. I'm hooking into Cobblemon's native support for glowing Pokemon, which has compatibility with several dynamic lighting mods. 

These are the dynamic lighting mods I've tested that work:
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights)

If you find additional mods that work with this pack, please let me know and I'll update that list.

Any shaders that support entity lights should also works with this, such as [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) (but you still need to install one of the lighting mods above).

<details>
